de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution

Class ExecutionVariableExtractor.ExtractedExecutionVariable

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.AbstractExecutionElement
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.AbstractExecutionVariable
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.ExecutionVariableExtractor.ExtractedExecutionVariable
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    IExecutionElement, IExecutionVariable
    Enclosing class:
    ExecutionVariableExtractor

    public static class ExecutionVariableExtractor.ExtractedExecutionVariable
extends AbstractExecutionVariable
    The IExecutionVariable instantiated by the ExecutionVariableExtractor.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

      • values

        private List<IExecutionValue> values
        The contained IExecutionValues.

    • Constructor Detail

      • ExecutionVariableExtractor.ExtractedExecutionVariable

        public ExecutionVariableExtractor.ExtractedExecutionVariable(IExecutionNode<?> parentNode,
                                                     Node proofNode,
                                                     PosInOccurrence modalityPIO,
                                                     IProgramVariable programVariable,
                                                     Term arrayIndex,
                                                     Term arrayStartIndex,
                                                     Term arrayEndIndex,
                                                     Term additionalCondition,
                                                     ExecutionVariableExtractor.ExtractedExecutionValue parentValue)
        Constructor.
        Parameters:
        parentNode - The IExecutionNode providing relevant information.
        proofNode - The Node of KeY's proof tree which is represented by this IExecutionNode.
        modalityPIO - The PosInOccurrence of the modality of interest.
        programVariable - The represented IProgramVariable which value is shown.
        arrayIndex - The index in the parent array.
        additionalCondition - An optional additional condition to consider.
        parentValue - The parent IExecutionValue or null if not available.
